earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes continued streaming, soundtrack memory, and legacy-rights splits that reduce the artist-side take.

ownership.master_owner: Primarily label-controlled master with artist or estate royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears split across songwriters and rightsholders
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumed at the song level
ownership.notes: This is a gross-to-net estimate, not a public royalty statement.
